headline: Earnings And Positive Analyst Sentiment Make Ecolab Inc. (ECL) Attractive For Second Half Of 2026
summary: Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) is one of the Best 52-Week Low Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On May 5, RBC Capital analyst Ashish Sabadra reaffirmed a Buy rating on Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) and assigned a price target of $337 on the stock. This reflects an upside of 35% from current levels. This positive sentiment […]
